clean_headline: Change in Directorate of Thomas Cook (India) Ltd approved by Members through Postal Ballot
raw_headline: Ashoka Concessions Limited has informed the Company that the existing Class A CCDs are varied and converted to equivalent number of Class A OCDs effective March 13, 2026.

clean_headline: Thomas Cook (India) Ltd announces change in directorate.
